attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Vitamin B12 deficiency anaemia due to intrinsic factor deficiency
Subacute combined degeneration of the spinal cord

transform_flags: Age inferred as 72 (older_adult): source states only 'elderly patient' with no exact age — please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female: the source note gives no sex; inference is weak (pernicious anaemia has a modest female predominance) — please confirm on clinician review.

Provisional case_id SPEC-HAEMAT-03-00215 — SEQ is provisional; ingest --reseq assigns the real sequence within the SPEC-HAEMAT-03 bucket. Primary specialty set to HAEMAT (pernicious anaemia is the autoimmune haematological anchor); MH added as secondary because the acute driver is anxiety/hyperventilation — reviewer may prefer MH or GP as primary.

Telehealth reprojection applied (source is an in-person home assessment): the normal neurological examination, negative Romberg, and no-postural-drop findings that excluded stroke/SCD/severe anaemia are clinician-only and were SEALED into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; patient-obtainable vitals (BP, HR, SpO2, temperature, respiratory observation) were placed in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false). The presentation layer was de-anchored to the patient's pre-diagnosis experience and worries.

Baseline tier set to T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment), NOT the source's low environmental/social risk rating: telehealth cannot perform the examination that made the in-person clinician's benign call safe, so the honest disposition is same-day assessment plus FAST safety-netting — while explicitly flagging 000/stroke call-out as over-triage for this FAST-negative symmetrical picture.
No B12 injection dose is stated in the source; dose deliberately omitted (never synthesised). B12 dosing is left to the GP.

Source note's patient-education claims ('the tingling vanishing proves your nerves are healthy', 'your spinal cord is perfectly healthy') were encoded as errors_of_commission (false remote certainty), not reproduced as model answers.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
